name: full-devonz
description: Devonz — full monorepo: web app, desktop editor, web editor, shared packages

scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --parallel run build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter '@devonz/bridge' run build && pnpm --filter '@devonz/ai-core' run build && pnpm --filter '@devonz/ui' run build && pnpm --filter '@devonz/sdk' run build
